title: Classic Tour of Geysers, Hot Springs and Wildlife
summary:
I hadn't been to Yellowstone since I was a very small child, so Helen insisted that we make a visit. Our day was a tour of the classic Yellowstone sightseeing stops. Some of the highlights include Mammoth Springs, the Grand Prismatic Spring, and of course an eruption of the Old Faithful geyser. Along the way, we saw tons of wildlife, including bears, a huge herd of bison and some elk grazing on the side of the road. We were lucky to find an available campsite in the packed Bridge Bay campground within the park. We spent the evening reading, journaling and going on a little walk with Maya down to Yellowstone Lake. Before leaving the park, we drove to a beautiful overlook with a view of a bison herd to cook breakfast burritos and brew some coffee.

-Colin
